title: The North-Eastern Council Act, 1971
full_text: The North-Eastern Council Act, 1971 पूर्वोत्तर परिषद् अधिनियम, 1971 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1971-84 Act Number: 84 Enactment Date: 1971-12-30 Act Year: 1971 Short Title: The North-Eastern Council Act, 1971 Hindi Title: पूर्वोत्तर परिषद् अधिनियम, 1971 Long Title: An Act to provide for the setting up of a Council for the north-eastern areas of India to be called the North-Eastern Council and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region Enforcement Date: 01-08-1972 Notification: 1st August, 1972, vide notification No. G.S.R. 359(E), dated 25th July, 1972, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Setting up and composition of the North-Eastern Council. Section 4. Functions of the Council. Section 5. Meetings of the Council. Section 6. Nomination of certain officers to attend the meetings of the Council. Section 7. Officers and staff of the Council. Section 8. Repeal.
